services.name: Botox (Anti-Wrinkle Injections)
services.description: Botulinum toxin injections to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Treatment areas include forehead, frown lines, and crow's feet.
services.results: Visible within 3–5 days, full effect in 2 weeks

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Hyaluronic acid-based fillers to restore volume, enhance contours, and smooth deep lines. Areas include lips, cheeks, jawline, and nasolabial folds.
services.results: Immediate, with final results after 2 weeks

services.name: Initial Consultation
services.description: A complimentary face-to-face or virtual consultation with one of our qualified practitioners to discuss your goals, assess suitability, and create a personalised treatment plan.
services.note: No obligation to proceed with treatment

booking.how_to_book: Send us a message on WhatsApp at +44 7700 900123 or book online at www.bloomaesthetics.co.uk/book
booking.cancellation_policy: We require at least 24 hours' notice for cancellations. Late cancellations or no-shows may incur a fee.
booking.deposit: A £50 deposit is required to secure your booking, deducted from your treatment cost.

triggers: More than 2 consecutive questions the AI cannot answer from the SOP
escalation_rules.action: Politely inform the customer that you are connecting them with a team member who can better assist.

faqs.question: What are your opening hours?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM. We are closed on Sundays.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book via WhatsApp at +44 7700 900123 or through our website at www.bloomaesthetics.co.uk/book.

faqs.question: How much does Botox cost?
faqs.answer: Botox treatments start from £200. The exact cost depends on the treatment area and the amount of product required, which will be discussed during your free consultation.

faqs.question: How much do fillers cost?
faqs.answer: Dermal filler treatments start from £250. Pricing varies based on the area treated and volume of filler used.

faqs.question: Do I need a consultation first?
faqs.answer: We offer a free initial consultation where we assess your needs and create a personalised treatment plan. While not mandatory for all treatments, we highly recommend it.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: We require at least 24 hours' notice for cancellations. Late cancellations or no-shows may incur a fee.

faqs.question: Are the treatments safe?
faqs.answer: All our treatments are performed by qualified and experienced practitioners. We use only FDA-approved and CE-marked products. Safety is discussed in detail during your consultation.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, all major credit and debit cards, and bank transfers. A £50 deposit is required at the time of booking.

policies.age_requirement: All clients must be 18 years or older.
policies.aftercare: Detailed aftercare instructions are provided following every treatment.
policies.patch_test: A patch test may be required for certain treatments and will be discussed during consultation.
